channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: What privacy settings has WhatsApp changed?
item.description: The app said it will be rolling out usernames gradually, in a move meant to improve privacy.

item.title: US envoys in Doha for indirect talks with Iranian technical delegation
item.description: Iran says it has sent an expert delegation to Doha to follow up on the release of frozen Iranian funds.

item.title: UK’s Starmer announces 300-billion-pound defence investment plan
item.description: Plan includes more than 5 billion pounds for drones and autonomous systems over four years, Ministry of Defence says.

item.title: Apple iPhone 18 Pro secrets leaked in Tata Electronics hack: What we know
item.description: Documents and photos are stolen from Apple’s Indian supplier. How does this impact the US tech giant?

item.title: France vs Sweden: World Cup Round of 32 – Mbappe, prediction, team lineups
item.description: Kylian Mbappe's France, the title favourites for the 2026 World Cup, take on Alexander Isak's Sweden in the last 32.

item.title: Islamic centre brings joy through World Cup watch parties
item.description: At an Islamic centre in US, World Cup watch parties are giving many a place to cheer on teams chasing football history.

item.title: Anti-migrant rally in South Africa demands undocumented foreigners leave
item.description: Anti-migrant rally in South Africa demands undocumented foreigners leave.

item.title: South Africa deploys police as anti-immigrant protests prompt fears
item.description: Anti-migrant groups have demanded undocumented foreigners leave the country by Tuesday.

item.title: Are US and Iranian negotiators meeting in Doha? What we know about talks
item.description: Trump says Iran wants to meet in Qatar after attacks, but Tehran says it is sending a delegation only over frozen funds.

item.title: Morocco player hugs mother as team celebrates win against Netherlands
item.description: Morocco’s Ismael Saibari embraced his mother after scoring the winning penalty against Netherlands.

item.title: Gojek co-founder Nadiem Makarim sentenced to 10 years for corruption
item.description: Indonesia court finds former education minister guilty of abuse of authority and of causing state losses.

item.title: FIFA World Cup: Tuesday schedule, predictions and eliminated teams
item.description: World Cup Day 20 sees France, Norway and Mexico chase Round of 16 places as the knockout stage continues.

item.title: US Supreme Court hands Trump 3-1 defeat in key rulings: What we know
item.description: The justices deliver consequential rulings on mail-in ballots, the E Jean Carroll case and the firing of Lisa Cook.

item.title: Man in Gaza survives double tap Israeli strike on vehicle
item.description: Man in Gaza survives double tap Israeli strike on vehicle

item.title: Advocacy groups file complaint against Ghana over Trump deportations
item.description: The deportees were sent to Ghana, then to their home countries, despite earlier rulings by US judges that it was unsafe.

item.title: The next British PM should steer clear of Starmer’s shameful legacy
item.description: The outgoing PM succeeded in enabling genocide and failed miserably at improving the lives of ordinary Brits.

item.title: Top 5 World Cup knockout shocks – Paraguay win hurts Germany again
item.description: Paraguay's longshot win against Germany in the Round of 32 is the latest in a long line of World Cup knockout boilovers.

item.title: Video: At least two killed and hundreds displaced in Israeli attack on Gaza
item.description: An Israeli attack on the al-Mawasi camp in Khan Younis has killed several people, including a mother and her child.

item.title: Heatwave scorches east Europe as Slovakia, Czechia see record temperatures
item.description: Some 130 million people in Central and Eastern Europe endure temperatures above 35C (95F) as heat records set.

item.title: Caracas park helps children cope through activities after twin quakes
item.description: A public park in Caracas has been transformed into a hub of activities for children to help them cope after twin quakes.

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 19: Morocco beats Netherlands; Germany crashes out
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: EU gets tough on China as trade imbalance stokes deindustrialisation fears
item.description: Talks between EU trade commissioner and Chinese commerce minister come as bloc seeks to limit influx of Chinese imports.

item.title: What to know about the Colorado primary elections in the US
item.description: The western state is the latest to see fierce contests between the Democratic Party's progressive and centrist wings.

item.title: Ivory Coast vs Norway: FIFA World Cup Round of 32: Prediction, how to watch
item.description: Erling Haaland's Norway face Yan Diomande-powered Ivory Coast, as the pair clash for a place in the round of 16.

item.title: Millions in India’s Bengal risk losing welfare benefits over voter deletion
item.description: Controversial revision of electoral rolls removed millions. Now, the BJP says they are not eligible for government aid.
